message.content:
<deliberation>
I reviewed each main REG node against the entire policy chunk. No cross-references were provided, and none are cited in the node texts, so considered_references are empty for each. The policy chunk does not contain statements that contradict, narrow, negate, or reorder the regulatory requirements. Where the policy is silent (e.g., real-world testing permission; testing to ensure compliance with section-wide requirements), I treated omissions as Non-Deviation per instructions. REG-091 was not provided in the regulation set; without a quoted regulatory basis, it must be classified as Non-Deviation.
</deliberation>
